requirement_topic.en: MASM Conformity Certification — Overall Process and Technical File vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: MASM 合格认证——整体流程与技术文件 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: MASM 合格認證——整體流程與技術文件 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for regulated LED luminaires in Mongolia is governed by conformity certification administered by MASM (Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology). The typical route involves: (1) compiling a technical file (product description, ratings, component specifications, and test reports against the applicable MNS/IEC standards such as MNS IEC 60598-1, MNS IEC 62560, and EMC/photobiological standards as relevant); (2) testing against the adopted MNS standards (IEC CB Scheme reports may be accepted where MASM recognises them — confirm); (3) submitting the certification application, generally through a registered in-country importer; (4) obtaining the MASM conformity certificate before regulated products are placed on the market. Mongolia is a national regime (NOT an EAEU member), so EAEU conformity marks do not substitute for MASM certification.
summary.zh: 蒙古受管制 LED 灯具的市场准入由 MASM（蒙古标准计量局）管理的合格认证规范。典型路径包括：（1）编制技术文件（产品说明、额定值、零部件规格，以及按适用 MNS/IEC 标准如 MNS IEC 60598-1、MNS IEC 62560 及相关 EMC/光生物标准出具的检测报告）；（2）按所采 MNS 标准检测（在 MASM 认可时可接受 IEC CB 体系报告——须确认）；（3）提交认证申请，一般经由已登记的在地进口商办理；（4）在受管制产品投放市场前取得 MASM 合格证书。蒙古为国家制度（非 EAEU 成员），故 EAEU 合格标志不能替代 MASM 认证。
summary.zht: 蒙古受管制 LED 燈具的市場准入由 MASM（蒙古標準計量局）管理的合格認證規範。典型路徑包括：（1）編制技術文件（產品說明、額定值、零部件規格，以及按適用 MNS/IEC 標準如 MNS IEC 60598-1、MNS IEC 62560 及相關 EMC/光生物標準出具的檢測報告）；（2）按所採 MNS 標準檢測（在 MASM 認可時可接受 IEC CB 體系報告——須確認）；（3）提交認證申請，一般經由已登記的在地進口商辦理；（4）在受管制產品投放市場前取得 MASM 合格證書。蒙古為國家制度（非 EAEU 成員），故 EAEU 合格標誌不能替代 MASM 認證。

standards_or_laws: MASM — conformity certification scheme for regulated products (technical file, testing against MNS standards, certificate issuance)
MNS IEC 60598-1 / MNS IEC 62560 — adopted product standards forming the technical basis

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for luminaires sold in the residential market is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China). CCC requires mandatory third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body (e.g., CQC — China Quality Certification Centre), with testing at CNCA-authorized laboratories. CQC voluntary certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC scope. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required. CCC certificates are issued for the Chinese market and are not recognised for MASM purposes in Mongolia.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向居民市场销售灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）管理。CCC 要求由 CNCA 授权机构（如中国质量认证中心 CQC）进行强制性第三方认证，检测在 CNCA 授权实验室进行。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品，CQC 自愿性认证可申请。对于无线功能灯具，还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 证书面向中国市场签发，不被蒙古 MASM 目的所认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向居民市場銷售燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）管理。CCC 要求由 CNCA 授權機構（如中國質量認證中心 CQC）進行強制性第三方認證，檢測在 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品，CQC 自願性認證可申請。對於無線功能燈具，還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 證書面向中國市場簽發，不被蒙古 MASM 目的所認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: CCC and MASM are parallel, non-mutual conformity schemes — a product needs separate technical files, test evidence, and certification for each market. Key Mongolia-specific points: (1) certification is generally processed through a registered in-country importer, which is the practical access mechanism (the importer often holds the certificate/registration); (2) testing must be against the adopted MNS/IEC standards — IEC CB Scheme reports may streamline acceptance if MASM recognises them, which is a potential advantage over reusing CCC-only reports; (3) documentation may be required in Mongolian for certain submissions and consumer markings; (4) because Mongolia is not an EAEU member, neither EAC conformity nor CCC substitutes for MASM. Confirm the exact certified-product list, accepted test-report basis (e.g., CB Scheme), and importer obligations with MASM before shipment.
gap.zh: CCC 与 MASM 为并行、互不承认的合格评定方案——产品须为各市场分别准备技术文件、检测证据及认证。蒙古特有要点：（1）认证一般经由已登记的在地进口商办理，这是实际准入机制（进口商常持有证书/登记）；（2）检测须按所采 MNS/IEC 标准——若 MASM 认可，IEC CB 体系报告可加快受理，相较仅重用 CCC 报告是潜在优势；（3）某些提交及消费者标记可能须使用蒙古语文件；（4）因蒙古非 EAEU 成员，EAC 合格标志或 CCC 均不能替代 MASM。出货前请向 MASM 确认确切的认证产品清单、所接受的检测报告基础（如 CB 体系）及进口商义务。
gap.zht: CCC 與 MASM 為並行、互不承認的合格評定方案——產品須為各市場分別準備技術文件、檢測證據及認證。蒙古特有要點：（1）認證一般經由已登記的在地進口商辦理，這是實際准入機制（進口商常持有證書/登記）；（2）檢測須按所採 MNS/IEC 標準——若 MASM 認可，IEC CB 體系報告可加快受理，相較僅重用 CCC 報告是潛在優勢；（3）某些提交及消費者標記可能須使用蒙古語文件；（4）因蒙古非 EAEU 成員，EAC 合格標誌或 CCC 均不能替代 MASM。出貨前請向 MASM 確認確切的認證產品清單、所接受的檢測報告基礎（如 CB 體系）及進口商義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (regulated products) — MASM conformity certification required before regulated LED luminaires are placed on the Mongolian market; generally processed via a registered in-country importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access for regulated LED luminaires in Mongolia runs through MASM conformity certification against adopted MNS/IEC standards, typically via a registered in-country importer. CCC and MASM are parallel non-mutual schemes — a Chinese CCC certificate does not substitute for MASM. An IEC CB Scheme report may streamline acceptance where MASM recognises it. Mongolia is not an EAEU member, so EAC marks do not apply. Confirm the certified-product list, accepted test-report basis, and importer obligations with MASM before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古受管制 LED 灯具的市场准入通过 MASM 按所采 MNS/IEC 标准的合格认证实现，通常经由已登记的在地进口商办理。CCC 与 MASM 为并行、互不承认的方案——中国 CCC 证书不能替代 MASM。在 MASM 认可时，IEC CB 体系报告可加快受理。蒙古非 EAEU 成员，故 EAC 标志不适用。出货前请向 MASM 确认认证产品清单、所接受的检测报告基础及进口商义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古受管制 LED 燈具的市場准入通過 MASM 按所採 MNS/IEC 標準的合格認證實現，通常經由已登記的在地進口商辦理。CCC 與 MASM 為並行、互不承認的方案——中國 CCC 證書不能替代 MASM。在 MASM 認可時，IEC CB 體系報告可加快受理。蒙古非 EAEU 成員，故 EAC 標誌不適用。出貨前請向 MASM 確認認證產品清單、所接受的檢測報告基礎及進口商義務。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer Registration, Labelling and Language Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商登记、标识及语言要求
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商登記、標識及語言要求

summary.en: Because Mongolia is landlocked and operates a national regime, market access for imported LED luminaires generally depends on a registered in-country importer who handles customs clearance, MASM certification/registration, and distribution. Consumer-facing product information, safety warnings, and instructions may need to be provided in Mongolian where required by national consumer-protection and labelling rules, and packaging may need to identify the importer. Goods enter via rail and road links (landlocked — no seaport), which affects logistics and lead times but not the certification substance. The importer is typically the entity that interfaces with MASM and holds or supports the conformity certification on behalf of the foreign manufacturer.
summary.zh: 由于蒙古为内陆国家并实行国家制度，进口 LED 灯具的市场准入一般依赖于办理清关、MASM 认证/登记及分销的已登记在地进口商。面向消费者的产品信息、安全警告及说明，在国家消费者保护和标识规则要求时可能须以蒙古语提供，包装可能须标明进口商。货物经铁路和公路通道入境（内陆——无海港），这影响物流和交期，但不影响认证实质。进口商通常是与 MASM 对接、并代表外国制造商持有或支持合格认证的主体。
summary.zht: 由於蒙古為內陸國家並實行國家制度，進口 LED 燈具的市場准入一般依賴於辦理清關、MASM 認證/登記及分銷的已登記在地進口商。面向消費者的產品信息、安全警告及說明，在國家消費者保護和標識規則要求時可能須以蒙古語提供，包裝可能須標明進口商。貨物經鐵路和公路通道入境（內陸——無海港），這影響物流和交期，但不影響認證實質。進口商通常是與 MASM 對接、並代表外國製造商持有或支持合格認證的主體。

standards_or_laws: Mongolian import / customs and in-country importer registration requirements
Mongolian consumer-protection and product-labelling rules (Mongolian-language markings where required)

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market, the manufacturer or domestic seller handles CCC certification, CEL energy-label registration, and Chinese-language labelling directly under SAMR/CNCA frameworks — there is no concept of a foreign-importer-of-record because the product is sold domestically. Chinese labelling is in Chinese and follows GB requirements. When exporting, the manufacturer must instead work with a Mongolian importer and meet Mongolian language and importer-identification requirements, which is an additional step relative to selling domestically in China.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，制造商或国内销售方直接在 SAMR/CNCA 框架下办理 CCC 认证、CEL 能效标识登记及中文标识——因产品在国内销售，故不存在外国进口记录人的概念。中文标识依 GB 要求以中文呈现。出口时，制造商须改为与蒙古进口商合作，并满足蒙古语言及进口商标识要求，相对在中国国内销售这是额外步骤。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，製造商或國內銷售方直接在 SAMR/CNCA 框架下辦理 CCC 認證、CEL 能效標識登記及中文標識——因產品在國內銷售，故不存在外國進口記錄人的概念。中文標識依 GB 要求以中文呈現。出口時，製造商須改為與蒙古進口商合作，並滿足蒙古語言及進口商標識要求，相對在中國國內銷售這是額外步驟。

standards_or_laws: China domestic market — manufacturer/seller handles CCC, CEL, and Chinese-language labelling directly (no foreign importer-of-record concept)

gap.en: The importer-and-language dimension is an export-specific requirement with no domestic-China analogue. Chinese manufacturers should: (1) appoint or partner with a registered Mongolian importer who can interface with MASM, clear customs (rail/road), and hold/support the conformity certification; (2) prepare Mongolian-language consumer information, safety warnings, and instructions where national rules require, plus importer identification on packaging; (3) plan logistics around landlocked rail/road routing (longer lead times, border procedures). None of this requires a product re-design, but it is administrative overhead beyond the technical certification. Confirm the precise importer-registration, labelling, and language obligations with MASM, customs, and the chosen importer.
gap.zh: 进口商与语言这一维度是出口特有要求，无中国国内对应。中国制造商应：（1）指定或与已登记的蒙古进口商合作，由其与 MASM 对接、办理清关（铁路/公路）并持有/支持合格认证；（2）在国家规则要求时准备蒙古语消费者信息、安全警告及说明，并在包装上标明进口商；（3）围绕内陆铁路/公路路由规划物流（更长交期、口岸程序）。上述均不需要产品重新设计，但属于技术认证之外的行政开销。请与 MASM、海关及所选进口商确认确切的进口商登记、标识及语言义务。
gap.zht: 進口商與語言這一維度是出口特有要求，無中國國內對應。中國製造商應：（1）指定或與已登記的蒙古進口商合作，由其與 MASM 對接、辦理清關（鐵路/公路）並持有/支持合格認證；（2）在國家規則要求時準備蒙古語消費者信息、安全警告及說明，並在包裝上標明進口商；（3）圍繞內陸鐵路/公路路由規劃物流（更長交期、口岸程序）。上述均不需要產品重新設計，但屬於技術認證之外的行政開銷。請與 MASM、海關及所選進口商確認確切的進口商登記、標識及語言義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (practical access) — a registered in-country importer is generally required for market access; Mongolian-language consumer markings and importer identification may be required per national rules
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable domestically — for the Chinese market the manufacturer/seller handles CCC, CEL, and Chinese labelling directly; no foreign importer-of-record concept

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access in Mongolia generally depends on a registered in-country importer who handles MASM certification, customs (rail/road, landlocked), and distribution, plus Mongolian-language consumer markings/warnings and importer identification where national rules require. This is export-specific administrative overhead with no domestic-China analogue, but does not require product re-design. Confirm importer-registration, labelling, and language obligations with MASM, customs, and the chosen importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古的市场准入一般依赖于办理 MASM 认证、清关（铁路/公路，内陆）及分销的已登记在地进口商，并在国家规则要求时提供蒙古语消费者标记/警告及进口商标识。这是出口特有的行政开销，无中国国内对应，但不需要产品重新设计。请与 MASM、海关及所选进口商确认进口商登记、标识及语言义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古的市場准入一般依賴於辦理 MASM 認證、清關（鐵路/公路，內陸）及分銷的已登記在地進口商，並在國家規則要求時提供蒙古語消費者標記/警告及進口商標識。這是出口特有的行政開銷，無中國國內對應，但不需要產品重新設計。請與 MASM、海關及所選進口商確認進口商登記、標識及語言義務。

requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances and Chemical Supply-Chain Duties — No RoHS / No REACH-Style Notification in Mongolia
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质与化学品供应链义务——蒙古无 RoHS / 无 REACH 式通报
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質與化學品供應鏈義務——蒙古無 RoHS / 無 REACH 式通報

summary.en: Mongolia does not impose an EU-style horizontal RoHS substance restriction on LED luminaires as a market-access condition, and it has no equivalent to the EU REACH Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification duty or the ECHA SCIP database. As a national (non-EAEU) regime, the EAEU technical regulations on hazardous substances also do not apply. General chemical-safety, hazardous-chemicals classification/labelling, and environmental rules of Mongolia may still apply to chemicals as such, and individual product specifications or government-procurement tenders could reference substance limits, but there is no general standing obligation to screen articles against a candidate list and notify customers as under EU REACH. Verify any product-specific or contractual substance requirements with MASM, the relevant Mongolian authority, and the importer.
summary.zh: 蒙古不将欧盟式横向 RoHS 物质限制作为 LED 灯具的市场准入条件，也无相当于欧盟 REACH 第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务或 ECHA SCIP 数据库的制度。作为国家（非 EAEU）制度，EAEU 关于有害物质的技术法规亦不适用。蒙古的一般化学品安全、危险化学品分类/标识及环境规则仍可能适用于化学品本身，个别产品规范或政府采购招标也可能引用物质限值，但不存在像欧盟 REACH 那样、须对照候选清单筛查物品并通报客户的一般持续义务。请与 MASM、相关蒙古主管机关及进口商核实任何产品特定或合同性物质要求。
summary.zht: 蒙古不將歐盟式橫向 RoHS 物質限制作為 LED 燈具的市場准入條件，也無相當於歐盟 REACH 第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務或 ECHA SCIP 數據庫的制度。作為國家（非 EAEU）制度，EAEU 關於有害物質的技術法規亦不適用。蒙古的一般化學品安全、危險化學品分類/標識及環境規則仍可能適用於化學品本身，個別產品規範或政府採購招標也可能引用物質限值，但不存在像歐盟 REACH 那樣、須對照候選清單篩查物品並通報客戶的一般持續義務。請與 MASM、相關蒙古主管機關及進口商核實任何產品特定或合同性物質要求。

standards_or_laws: Mongolia — no horizontal RoHS restriction and no REACH Article 33 / SCIP-equivalent supply-chain notification duty (national, non-EAEU regime)
Mongolian general chemical-safety / hazardous-chemicals classification and environmental rules (apply to chemicals as such; verify per product)

summary.en: China restricts the original 6 RoHS substances under GB/T 26572-2011 and requires hazardous-substance disclosure labelling under China RoHS 2 (SJ/T 11364-2014). China does not have a direct equivalent to REACH Article 33; the closest instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (2020) on new chemical substance registration and GB 30981 / chemical classification-and-labelling rules. Compared with Mongolia, China therefore has a more developed (disclosure-based) hazardous-substance regime for EEE, while neither China nor Mongolia operates a REACH-style standing SVHC supply-chain notification duty.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB/T 26572-2011 限制原 6 项 RoHS 物质，并依据中国 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求有害物质披露标识。中国无直接对应 REACH 第 33 条的制度；最接近的工具为关于新化学物质登记的生态环境部令第 12 号（2020）及 GB 30981/化学品分类与标签规则。因此相较蒙古，中国对 EEE 有更完善（基于披露）的有害物质制度，而中蒙两国均不实行 REACH 式持续 SVHC 供应链通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB/T 26572-2011 限制原 6 項 RoHS 物質，並依據中國 RoHS 2（SJ/T 11364-2014）要求有害物質披露標識。中國無直接對應 REACH 第 33 條的制度；最接近的工具為關於新化學物質登記的生態環境部令第 12 號（2020）及 GB 30981/化學品分類與標籤規則。因此相較蒙古，中國對 EEE 有更完善（基於披露）的有害物質制度，而中蒙兩國均不實行 REACH 式持續 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE (6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label
MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)

gap.en: Relative to the EU, the substance-compliance burden for Mongolia is substantially lighter: there is no horizontal RoHS market barrier, no mandated phthalate testing for access, and no REACH Article 33 / SCIP-style supply-chain notification duty. Because Mongolia is not an EAEU member, EAEU hazardous-substance rules also do not apply. A Chinese manufacturer's existing GB/T 26572 compliance and China RoHS 2 disclosure are generally more than adequate for Mongolian access on substances. Remaining diligence: (1) general Mongolian chemical-safety/environmental rules still apply to chemicals as such; (2) specific MNS standards, buyer contracts, or government-procurement specs could reference substance limits — verify per product; (3) if the same product is also placed on EU or EAEU markets, the stricter EU RoHS/REACH or EAEU TR duties apply for those markets only. Confirm any product-specific substance or chemical-documentation requirements with MASM and the importer.
gap.zh: 相较欧盟，蒙古的物质合规负担显著更轻：无横向 RoHS 市场门槛、市场准入不强制邻苯二甲酸酯检测、无 REACH 第 33 条 / SCIP 式供应链通报义务。因蒙古非 EAEU 成员，EAEU 有害物质规则亦不适用。中国制造商现有的 GB/T 26572 合规及中国 RoHS 2 披露，在物质方面对蒙古准入通常绰绰有余。仍须的尽职：（1）蒙古一般化学品安全/环境规则仍适用于化学品本身；（2）特定 MNS 标准、买方合同或政府采购规范可能引用物质限值——须按产品核实；（3）若同一产品同时投放欧盟或 EAEU 市场，则更严格的欧盟 RoHS/REACH 或 EAEU 技术法规义务仅适用于该等市场。请与 MASM 及进口商确认任何产品特定的物质或化学品文件要求。
gap.zht: 相較歐盟，蒙古的物質合規負擔顯著更輕：無橫向 RoHS 市場門檻、市場准入不強制鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測、無 REACH 第 33 條 / SCIP 式供應鏈通報義務。因蒙古非 EAEU 成員，EAEU 有害物質規則亦不適用。中國製造商現有的 GB/T 26572 合規及中國 RoHS 2 披露，在物質方面對蒙古准入通常綽綽有餘。仍須的盡職：（1）蒙古一般化學品安全/環境規則仍適用於化學品本身；（2）特定 MNS 標準、買方合同或政府採購規範可能引用物質限值——須按產品核實；（3）若同一產品同時投放歐盟或 EAEU 市場，則更嚴格的歐盟 RoHS/REACH 或 EAEU 技術法規義務僅適用於該等市場。請與 MASM 及進口商確認任何產品特定的物質或化學品文件要求。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Mongolia has no horizontal RoHS market barrier and no REACH Article 33 / SCIP-style notification duty; NOT an EAEU member, so EAEU hazardous-substance TR does not apply. General chemical-safety rules and product-specific references may still apply — verify per product
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) for the 6 RoHS substances under GB/T 26572 / China RoHS 2; no REACH-style standing SVHC supply-chain notification duty in China

source.publisher: MASM — Mongolian Agency for Standardization and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mongolia has no horizontal RoHS substance restriction and no REACH Article 33 / SCIP-style supply-chain notification duty, and as a non-EAEU national regime the EAEU hazardous-substance rules do not apply. A Chinese manufacturer's existing GB/T 26572 compliance and China RoHS 2 disclosure are generally more than adequate for Mongolian access on substances, with no mandated phthalate testing for access. General Mongolian chemical-safety rules and any product-specific or procurement substance references may still apply — verify per product with MASM and the importer. Stricter EU RoHS/REACH or EAEU TR duties apply only to those other markets, not Mongolia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 蒙古无横向 RoHS 物质限制，也无 REACH 第 33 条 / SCIP 式供应链通报义务，且作为非 EAEU 国家制度，EAEU 有害物质规则不适用。在物质方面，中国制造商现有的 GB/T 26572 合规及中国 RoHS 2 披露对蒙古准入通常绰绰有余，且市场准入不强制邻苯二甲酸酯检测。蒙古一般化学品安全规则及任何产品特定或采购物质引用仍可能适用——请与 MASM 及进口商按产品核实。更严格的欧盟 RoHS/REACH 或 EAEU 技术法规义务仅适用于该等其他市场，而非蒙古。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蒙古無橫向 RoHS 物質限制，也無 REACH 第 33 條 / SCIP 式供應鏈通報義務，且作為非 EAEU 國家制度，EAEU 有害物質規則不適用。在物質方面，中國製造商現有的 GB/T 26572 合規及中國 RoHS 2 披露對蒙古准入通常綽綽有餘，且市場准入不強制鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測。蒙古一般化學品安全規則及任何產品特定或採購物質引用仍可能適用——請與 MASM 及進口商按產品核實。更嚴格的歐盟 RoHS/REACH 或 EAEU 技術法規義務僅適用於該等其他市場，而非蒙古。
